description: 极简黑白 - 只用粗细和留白做层级,适合技术/工程向文章(tech 号默认)

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.4px; word-spacing: 1px; padding: 15px 0;
styles.h1: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #000000; text-align: left; margin: 36px 0 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 3px solid #000000;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: #000000; margin: 34px 0 14px; padding: 0; line-height: 1.5;
styles.h3: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 22px 0 10px; padding: 0; text-transform: none;
styles.blockquote: margin: 22px 0; padding: 14px 18px 14px 20px; background: #f5f5f5; border-left: 3px solid #000000; color: #2a2a2a; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.8;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 2px; margin: 20px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
styles.code_inline: background: #efefef; color: #c7254e; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace;
styles.code_block: background: #0d0d0d; color: #e5e5e5; padding: 18px 22px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; margin: 20px 0; border: 1px solid #222;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: #000000; margin: 36px 0; opacity: 0.2;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 13px; border: 1px solid #000000;
styles.th: background: #000000; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
styles.caption: font-size: 12px; color: #888; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #000000; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 11px; margin: 32px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.4;
